message:
Add browser automation unit tests

Add comprehensive tests for browser OAuth functions:
- TestExtractChallengeCode: Test challenge code extraction from HTML
  - Standard XXXX-XXXX format
  - Code in various HTML elements (div, span)
  - Complex nested HTML structures
  - Edge cases (too short, no code, alphanumeric codes)
  - Real Claude code patterns

These tests validate the code extraction logic without requiring
actual browser automation, enabling fast CI feedback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
